title: SafeMap AI
description: Real-time global travel safety platform with a 3D WebGL globe, AI-powered chatbot, and serverless backend. Won 3rd Place at Escape The Vincii '26.
longDescription: SafeMap AI is a comprehensive safety platform designed for global travelers. It leverages Three.js for a performant 3D globe visualization and integrates real-time safety data from various APIs. The project includes an AI chatbot that provides contextual safety advice based on the user's selected location.

title: RevvUp
description: Car modification ecosystem with a build tracker, community showcase, and vendor connections.
longDescription: RevvUp provides a centralized platform for car enthusiasts to document their modification journeys. Users can track parts, calculate build costs, share progress with the community, and connect with verified vendors and shops in the automotive space.

title: Personal Portfolio
description: A premium, cinematic portfolio website built with modern technologies.
longDescription: This portfolio project focuses on high-end UI/UX, using Framer Motion for complex animations and Next.js for performance. It features a cinematic hero section, a bento-style 'about' grid, and a custom projects gallery designed to showcase work in a professional, premium manner.

title: Women Safety SOS Device
description: IoT hardware device for rural women's safety featuring GPS tracking and instant voice distress alerts.
longDescription: A low-cost, high-impact IoT device designed for the safety of women in rural areas. The device features a panic button that triggers instant SMS alerts with GPS coordinates to emergency contacts and triggers a loud siren. It also includes an offline voice messaging module for communication in low-connectivity zones.
features: Instant SMS & Voice alerts via GSM
Low power consumption for long battery life
award: IIT Delhi Build for Rural India Hackathon
